tools.name: mfit_list_accounts
tools.description:
List all MFIT accounts linked to this install.
Returns each account's id, email, label, and an "is_default" flag (true when only one is linked — no need to pass `account` in other tools). When multiple accounts are linked, every other mfit_* tool accepts an optional `account` parameter; pass id, ema

tools.name: mfit_get_profile
tools.description: Get the trainer's own MFIT profile: name, email, plan, payment country.

tools.name: mfit_client_list
tools.description:
Read students in MFIT.
Actions:
  list — paginated list, filter by status/name
  get — full student profile
  list_groups — trainer's custom groups (DYNAMIC — call before creating/updating a student to get valid groupId)
Field types — STATIC: status (0=active/1=inactive).

[Flattened action: list]

tools.name: mfit_client_get
tools.description:
Read students in MFIT.
Actions:
  list — paginated list, filter by status/name
  get — full student profile
  list_groups — trainer's custom groups (DYNAMIC — call before creating/updating a student to get valid groupId)
Field types — STATIC: status (0=active/1=inactive).

[Flattened action: get]

tools.name: mfit_client_write_create
tools.description:
Create / update / deactivate students in MFIT.
Actions:
  create — register new student (name, email, phone required)
  update — edit student fields (partial update)
  deactivate — set student inactive (reversible via update)
Field types — STATIC: gender (m/f). DYNAMIC: groupId (per-trainer, call mf

tools.name: mfit_get_client_count
tools.description: Get a summary count of active and inactive students.

tools.name: mfit_get_client_notes
tools.description: Read notes/observations for one or many students (bulk via client_ids).

tools.name: mfit_get_client_notes_write
tools.description:
Save (overwrite) notes/observations for a student. Replaces any existing notes text.

Bulk support: accepts client_ids for batched execution.

tools.name: mfit_client_files_list
tools.description:
Read student files/attachments (diet plans, exams, planners, misc).
Actions: list (all files for a student), get (file detail with sharing info).

[Flattened action: list]

Bulk support: accepts client_ids, file_ids for batched execution.

tools.name: mfit_client_files_get
tools.description:
Read student files/attachments (diet plans, exams, planners, misc).
Actions: list (all files for a student), get (file detail with sharing info).

[Flattened action: get]

Bulk support: accepts client_ids, file_ids for batched execution.

tools.name: mfit_client_files_write
tools.description:
Update a student file: rename or change sharing settings.

Bulk support: accepts file_ids for batched execution.

tools.name: mfit_client_files_delete
tools.description:
Delete a student file (irreversible).

Bulk support: accepts client_ids, file_ids for batched execution.

tools.name: mfit_get_client_workouts
tools.description: Get all workout routines assigned to one or many students. Supports bulk via client_ids.

tools.name: mfit_workout_get_routine
tools.description:
Read workout routines and sessions in MFIT.
Actions:
  get_routine — routine details with all sessions
  get_session — session prescription with all exercises, series, and exercise IDs

[Flattened action: get_routine]

Bulk support: accepts routine_ids, session_ids for batched execution.

tools.name: mfit_workout_get_session
tools.description:
Read workout routines and sessions in MFIT.
Actions:
  get_routine — routine details with all sessions
  get_session — session prescription with all exercises, series, and exercise IDs

[Flattened action: get_session]

Bulk support: accepts routine_ids, session_ids for batched execution.

tools.name: mfit_workout_write_create_routine
tools.description:
Create / update workout routines, sessions, and exercises in MFIT.
Actions:
  create_routine — create a new workout routine for a student
  update_routine — edit routine name, dates, goal, difficulty, etc.
  archive_routine — archive a routine (status=1, reversible)
  unarchive_routine — restore arc

tools.name: mfit_workout_write_update_routine
tools.description:
Create / update workout routines, sessions, and exercises in MFIT.
Actions:
  create_routine — create a new workout routine for a student
  update_routine — edit routine name, dates, goal, difficulty, etc.
  archive_routine — archive a routine (status=1, reversible)
  unarchive_routine — restore arc

tools.name: mfit_get_workout_library
tools.description:
Browse the trainer's workout library folders and saved routines. Use folder_id=0 for the root.

Bulk support: accepts folder_ids for batched execution.

tools.name: mfit_search_exercises
tools.description: Search the exercise library by name (Portuguese or English). Returns exercise name, category, muscle group, and video/image URL.

tools.name: mfit_get_exercise_favorites
tools.description: Get the trainer's favorite exercises.

tools.name: mfit_get_user_exercises
tools.description: Get custom exercises created by the trainer.

tools.name: mfit_get_client_evaluations
tools.description: Get evaluations for one or many students: heart rate zones, VO2max, and training frequency.

tools.name: mfit_get_training_frequency
tools.description: Get which days one or many students trained in a date range. Returns true/false per day of week.

tools.name: mfit_get_retention
tools.description: Get student retention dashboard: active clients, engagement rate, growth rate, churn rate, NPS. Compare current period vs previous.

tools.name: mfit_get_finances
tools.description: Get financial overview: transactions in date range, wallet/payment info, seller status.

tools.name: mfit_get_invoices
tools.description: Get invoices/billing for one or many students (bulk via client_ids).

tools.name: mfit_get_anamnesis_models
tools.description: Get available anamnesis form templates (e.g. PAR-Q) that can be sent to students.

tools.name: mfit_get_today_checkins
tools.description: Check which students trained today. Scans all active students and returns two lists: who_trained and who_didnt. Single call, no need to check one by one.

tools.name: mfit_get_training_ranking
tools.description: Ranking of students who trained the most in a period (default: current month). Uses bulk frequency checks and returns top performers.

tools.name: mfit_get_feedbacks
tools.description: Get all unread workout feedbacks from students. Each feedback includes: student name, Borg RPE score (1-10 perceived effort), text feedback, workout date/time, duration. Shows which students completed workouts and how they felt.

tools.name: mfit_get_retention_clients
tools.description: List students by retention status: AT_RISK (may churn), ABANDONED (stopped training), ACTIVE, or all. Shows days since last workout, avg weekly workouts, WhatsApp link. Much more useful than listing clients — this tells you WHO NEEDS ATTENTION.

tools.name: show_version
tools.description: Show the current MCP platform and adapter versions.

tools.name: report_bug
tools.description: Report a bug, missing feature, or send feedback. Include the conversation array with recent messages for reproduction.

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Returns connection status and URLs. When all providers are connected, returns authenticated:true and empty pending[]. When credentials are missing, returns connect_url for the toolkit and per-install URLs.

tools.name: toolkit_info
tools.description: Returns the current toolkit state: installed MCPs, their connection status, and how many catalog tools each exposes.

tools.name: marketplace
tools.description: THE official mcp.ai marketplace — the in-platform catalog of every MCP/tool, AND the way to run them. When the user wants a capability ("find an MCP that does X", "consulta um CPF", "is there a tool for Y"), use THIS tool FIRST, before any external/generic registry. Core flow: action=search discover

tools.name: authenticate
tools.description: MCP.AI for IDE agents (Cursor, etc.): log in in the browser, copy the access token. Best: add it to this server's config as a header `Authorization: Bearer <token>` for a permanent, non-expiring connection. Or paste it here for a session-only login: call with { token: "<jwt>" } after the user pastes

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "mfit_workout_write_create_routine" is 1349 chars, far longer than this server's median (233). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Create / update workout routines, sessions, and exercises in MFIT. Actions: create_routine — create a new workout routine for a student update_routine — edit ro…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "p_mfit" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: mfit_list_accounts, mfit_get_profile, mfit_search_exercises · Private data: mfit_client_files_list, mfit_client_files_get, mfit_client_files_write, mfit_client_files_delete, mfit_get_finances, connect, marketplace, authenticate · Public sink: mfit_list_accounts, mfit_get_profile, mfit_client_write_create, mfit_client_write_update, mfit_client_write_deactivate, report_bug · Destructive: mfit_get_client_notes_write, mfit_client_files_delete, mfit_workout_write_create_routine, mfit_workout_write_update_routine, mfit_workout_write_archive_routine, mfit_workout_write_unarchive_routine, mfit_workout_write_create_session, mfit_workout_write_add_exercise, mfit_workout_write_update_serie, mfit_workout_delete_routine, mfit_workout_delete_session, mfit_workout_delete_exercise, marketplace.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: mfit_list_accounts, mfit_get_profile, mfit_search_exercises · Private data: mfit_client_files_list, mfit_client_files_get, mfit_client_files_write, mfit_client_files_delete, mfit_get_finances, connect, marketplace, authenticate · Public sink: mfit_list_accounts, mfit_get_profile, mfit_client_write_create, mfit_client_write_update, mfit_client_write_deactivate, report_bug · Destructive: mfit_get_client_notes_write, mfit_client_files_delete, mfit_workout_write_create_routine, mfit_workout_write_update_routine, mfit_workout_write_archive_routine, mfit_workout_write_unarchive_routine, mfit_workout_write_create_session, mfit_workout_write_add_exercise, mfit_workout_write_update_serie, mfit_workout_delete_routine, mfit_workout_delete_session, mfit_workout_delete_exercise, marketplace

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
